option.value:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <meta name="description" content="Predict developer salary with a refined FastAPI frontend built for clarity, precision, and premium data presentation." />
  <meta property="og:title" content="Developer Salary Prediction" />
  <meta property="og:description" content="A premium salary prediction interface for developers and tech professionals." />
  <meta property="og:image" content="PHOTOS/dash1.png" />
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#0b0d12" />
  <title>Developer Salary Prediction</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    :root {
      color-scheme: dark;
      --bg: #0b0d12;
      --bg-elevated: #10141b;
      --surface: rgba(16, 20, 27, 0.82);
      --surface-strong: rgba(20, 25, 34, 0.94);
      --surface-soft: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.035);
      --surface-hover: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
      --border: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.16);
      --border-strong: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.26);
      --text: #f4f6fb;
      --text-muted: rgba(221, 227, 236, 0.72);
      --text-soft: rgba(221, 227, 236, 0.54);
      --accent: #8bd3c7;
      --accent-strong: #b9f0e6;
      --accent-dim: rgba(139, 211, 199, 0.18);
      --accent-rgb: 139, 211, 199;
      --success: #8ed6b3;
      --success-bg: rgba(31, 80, 63, 0.44);
      --danger: #f7a7b7;
      --danger-bg: rgba(95, 39, 53, 0.42);
      --warning: #f5d69b;
      --shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38), 0 6px 20px rgba(7, 10, 17, 0.24);
      --shadow-soft: 0 18px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24);
      --radius-xl: 28px;
      --radius-lg: 22px;
      --radius-md: 16px;
      --radius-sm: 12px;
      --ease-out: cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1);
      --ease-in-out: cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1);
    }
    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }
    html {
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
    }
    body {
      margin: 0;
      min-height: 100dvh;
      font-family: "Outfit", "Segoe UI", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
      color: var(--text);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 14% 12%, rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.12), transparent 24%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 82% 4%, rgba(124, 156, 255, 0.08), transparent 20%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 90% 85%, rgba(139, 211, 199, 0.08), transparent 24%),
        linear-gradient(180deg, #0b0d12 0%, #0d1016 54%, #0b0d12 100%);
      position: relative;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
    }
    body::before,
    body::after {
      content: "";
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 0;
    }
    body::before {
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 20% 10%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05), transparent 18%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03), transparent 16%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 65% 80%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03), transparent 18%);
      opacity: 0.7;
    }
    body::after {
      opacity: 0.08;
      background-image: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 72px 72px;
      mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black 52%, transparent 100%);
    }
    a {
      color: inherit;
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    img {
      max-width: 100%;
      display: block;
    }
    .skip-link {
      position: absolute;
      left: 1rem;
      top: 1rem;
      z-index: 20;
      padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--accent-strong);
      color: #071012;
      font-weight: 700;
      transform: translateY(-180%);
      transition: transform 160ms var(--ease-out);
    }
    .skip-link:focus {
      transform: translateY(0);
      outline: none;
    }
    .page {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      max-width: 1320px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 24px 20px 40px;
    }
    .topbar {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 16px;
      margin-bottom: 26px;
    }
    .brand {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
      min-width: 0;
    }
    .brand-mark {
      width: 42px;
      height: 42px;
      border-radius: 14px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(139, 211, 199, 0.95), rgba(139, 211, 199, 0.18)),
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22), 0 16px 32px rgba(17, 35, 32, 0.34);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      color: #071012;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: -0.04em;
      flex: none;
    }
    .brand-copy {
      display: grid;
      gap: 2px;
      min-width: 0;
    }
    .brand-copy strong {
      font-size: 0.98rem;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    }
    .brand-copy span {
      color: var(--text-soft);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }
    .topbar-meta {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      justify-content: flex-end;
    }
    .chip {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      padding: 0.62rem 0.92rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      color: var(--text-muted);
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      line-height: 1;
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
    }
    .chip strong {
      color: var(--text);
      font-weight: 600;
    }
    .chip .dot {
      width: 8px;
      height: 8px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--accent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.14);
      flex: none;
    }
    .hero {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.18fr) minmax(320px, 0.82fr);
      gap: 24px;
      align-items: stretch;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    .hero-copy,
    .hero-signal,
    .panel,
    .results-panel {
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025)), var(--surface);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(120%);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow);
      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    }
    .hero-copy {
      padding: 28px;
      display: grid;
      gap: 18px;
      align-content: start;
    }
    .eyebrow {
      margin: 0;
      color: var(--accent);
      font-size: 0.86rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    h1,
    h2,
    h3 {
      margin: 0;
      text-wrap: balance;
      letter-spacing: -0.04em;
    }
    h1 {
      font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4.9rem);
      line-height: 0.96;
      max-width: 12ch;
    }
    .hero-copy p,
    .panel-copy,
    .results-note,
    .field-message,
    .form-status,
    .list-note {
      color: var(--text-muted);
      line-height: 1.65;
    }
    .hero-copy > p {
      margin: 0;
      max-width: 62ch;
      font-size: 1.03rem;
    }
    .hero-actions {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      align-items: center;
      margin-top: 2px;
    }
    .button,
    .button-secondary,
    .button-link {
      appearance: none;
      border: 0;
      border-radius: 999px;
      min-height: 48px;
      padding: 0.86rem 1.15rem;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 10px;
      font: inherit;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: -0.01em;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition:
        transform 160ms var(--ease-out),
        background-color 160ms var(--ease-out),
        border-color 160ms var(--ease-out),
        box-shadow 160ms var(--ease-out),
        color 160ms var(--ease-out);
      will-change: transform;
    }
    .button {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(139, 211, 199, 1), rgba(172, 235, 223, 0.95));
      color: #071012;
      box-shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(16, 81, 73, 0.28);
    }
    .button-secondary,
    .button-link {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02);
      color: var(--text);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
    }
    .button-link {
      min-height: auto;
      padding: 0.28rem 0.1rem;
      border: 0;
      border-radius: 0;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      box-shadow: none;
    }
    .button .icon,
    .button-secondary .icon,
    .button-link .icon {
      width: 18px;
      height: 18px;
      flex: none;
    }
    .hero-signal {
      padding: 26px;
      display: grid;
      gap: 20px;
      align-content: start;
    }
    .signal-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .signal-card {
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
      padding: 14px;
      min-height: 104px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 12px;
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
    }
    .signal-card span {
      color: var(--text-soft);
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      line-height: 1.35;
    }
    .signal-card strong {
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    }
    .signal-card code {
      font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace;
      font-size: 0.83rem;
      color: var(--accent-strong);
      background: rgba(139, 211, 199, 0.08);
      padding: 0.24rem 0.42rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      width: fit-content;
    }
    .signal-board {
      padding: 16px;
      border-radius: 18px;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(139, 211, 199, 0.08), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02));
      border: 1px solid rgba(139, 211, 199, 0.18);
      display: grid;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .signal-board h2 {
      font-size: 1.08rem;
      line-height: 1.15;
    }
    .signal-list {
      list-style: none;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      display: grid;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .signal-list li {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 10px;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      line-height: 1.55;
    }
    .signal-list svg {
      width: 16px;
      height: 16px;
      margin-top: 2px;
      color: var(--accent);
      flex: none;
    }
    .workspace {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.06fr) minmax(320px, 0.94fr);
      gap: 24px;
      align-items: start;
    }
    .panel {
      padding: 24px;
    }
    .panel-header {
      display: grid;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
    }
    .panel-header h2 {
      font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 2.1vw, 2rem);
      line-height: 1.1;
    }
    .form-status {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.025);
      font-size: 0.94rem;
    }
    .form-status.is-error {
      border-color: rgba(247, 167, 183, 0.2);
      background: var(--danger-bg);
      color: #ffd8e1;
    }
    .form-status.is-success {
      border-color: rgba(142, 214, 179, 0.18);
      background: var(--success-bg);
      color: #d8f5e6;
    }
    form {
      display: grid;
      gap: 18px;
    }
    fieldset {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      border: 0;
      display: grid;
      gap: 14px;
    }
    legend {
      margin-bottom: 2px;
      padding: 0;
      font-size: 0.86rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-soft);
    }
    .field-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
      gap: 14px;
    }
    .field-grid.single {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
    .field {
      display: grid;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    .field.full {
      grid-column: 1 / -1;
    }
    label {
      font-size: 0.97rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: -0.01em;
      color: var(--text);
    }
    input,
    select {
      width: 100%;
      min-height: 48px;
      padding: 0.86rem 0.95rem;
      border-radius: 14px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      color: var(--text);
      font: inherit;
      transition:
        transform 160ms var(--ease-out),
        border-color 160ms var(--ease-out),
        box-shadow 160ms var(--ease-out),
        background-color 160ms var(--ease-out);
      outline: none;
    }
     select {
       appearance: none;
       background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 50%, var(--accent-strong) 50%), linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-strong) 50%, transparent 50%);
       background-position: calc(100% - 18px) calc(50% - 3px), calc(100% - 12px) calc(50% - 3px);
       background-size: 6px 6px, 6px 6px;
       background-repeat: no-repeat;
       padding-right: 2.25rem;
       background-color: rgba(20, 25, 34, 0.6);
       color: var(--text);
       font-weight: 500;
     }
     select option {
       background-color: rgba(16, 20, 27, 0.95);
       color: var(--text);
       padding: 8px 12px;
       font-weight: 500;
     }
     select option:checked {
       background: linear-gradient(rgba(139, 211, 199, 0.3), rgba(139, 211, 199, 0.3)), rgba(16, 20, 27, 0.95);
       background-color: rgba(139, 211, 199, 0.2);
       color: var(--accent-strong);
       font-weight: 600;
     }
     input::placeholder {
      color: rgba(221, 227, 236, 0.42);
    }
     input:hover,
     select:hover {
       border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24);
       background-color: rgba(20, 25, 34, 0.75);
     }
     input:hover {
       background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
     }
    input:focus-visible,
    select:focus-visible,
    .button:focus-visible,
    .button-secondary:focus-visible,
    .button-link:focus-visible {
      border-color: rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.86);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.16);
    }
    input[aria-invalid="true"],
    select[aria-invalid="true"] {
      border-color: rgba(247, 167, 183, 0.55);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(247, 167, 183, 0.08);
    }
    .field-message {
      margin: 0;
      font-size: 0.84rem;
      min-height: 1.2em;
    }
    .field-message.is-error {
      color: #fbc4d0;
    }
    .field-message.is-muted {
      color: var(--text-soft);
    }
    .actions {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      align-items: center;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      padding-top: 4px;
    }
    .button:active,
    .button-secondary:active,
    .button-link:active {
      transform: scale(0.98);
    }
    .button:disabled {
      opacity: 0.72;
      cursor: progress;
      transform: none;
      box-shadow: none;
    }
    .results-panel {
      position: sticky;
      top: 20px;
      padding: 24px;
      display: grid;
      gap: 18px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .results-panel::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 15% 0%, rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.14), transparent 26%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 92% 12%, rgba(124, 156, 255, 0.08), transparent 22%);
      opacity: 0.88;
    }
    .results-shell,
    .results-skeleton {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
    }
    .results-shell {
      display: grid;
      gap: 16px;
      transition:
        opacity 180ms var(--ease-out),
        transform 180ms var(--ease-out),
        filter 180ms var(--ease-out);
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="loading"] .results-shell,
    .results-panel[data-state="error"] .results-shell {
      transform: translateY(2px);
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="loading"] .results-shell {
      opacity: 0.35;
      filter: blur(1px);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="idle"] .results-shell {
      opacity: 0.9;
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="success"] .results-shell {
      opacity: 1;
    }
    .results-kicker {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 12px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .results-kicker h2 {
      font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2vw, 2rem);
    }
    .status-pill {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      padding: 0.55rem 0.82rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
      color: var(--text-muted);
      font-size: 0.84rem;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .status-pill .pulse {
      width: 8px;
      height: 8px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--accent);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.12);
    }
    .salary-display {
      border-radius: 22px;
      padding: 20px;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.16), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03));
      border: 1px solid rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.16);
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      display: grid;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .salary-label {
      color: var(--text-soft);
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    .salary-value {
      display: flex;
      align-items: baseline;
      gap: 10px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
    }
    .salary-value .currency {
      color: var(--text-soft);
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    }
    .salary-value strong {
      font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 4.8rem);
      line-height: 0.92;
      letter-spacing: -0.06em;
      font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .salary-value span {
      color: var(--text-muted);
      font-size: 0.95rem;
    }
    .results-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .metric {
      padding: 16px;
      border-radius: 18px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
      display: grid;
      gap: 10px;
      min-height: 156px;
    }
    .metric span {
      color: var(--text-soft);
      font-size: 0.86rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    .metric strong {
      font-size: 1.45rem;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em;
      font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
    }
    .meter {
      position: relative;
      height: 8px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .meter > i {
      display: block;
      height: 100%;
      width: 42%;
      border-radius: inherit;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.55), rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 1));
      box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.28);
      transition: width 220ms var(--ease-out);
    }
    .metric p {
      margin: 0;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      font-size: 0.92rem;
      line-height: 1.5;
    }
    .results-note {
      margin: 0;
      padding-top: 4px;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
      font-size: 0.93rem;
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="error"] {
      border-color: rgba(247, 167, 183, 0.24);
      box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(50, 17, 25, 0.34), 0 6px 20px rgba(7, 10, 17, 0.24);
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="success"] {
      border-color: rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.24);
      box-shadow: 0 30px 90px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42), 0 0 0 1px rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.06);
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="success"] .salary-display {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.22), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04));
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="error"] .salary-display {
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(247, 167, 183, 0.14), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03));
      border-color: rgba(247, 167, 183, 0.16);
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="error"] .status-pill {
      color: #ffd8e1;
      background: rgba(247, 167, 183, 0.08);
      border-color: rgba(247, 167, 183, 0.16);
    }
    .results-skeleton {
      display: none;
      gap: 14px;
    }
    .skeleton-line,
    .skeleton-block,
    .skeleton-pill {
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
    }
    .skeleton-line::after,
    .skeleton-block::after,
    .skeleton-pill::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      transform: translateX(-100%);
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12), transparent);
      animation: shimmer 1.4s linear infinite;
    }
    .skeleton-pill {
      width: 112px;
      height: 32px;
      border-radius: 999px;
    }
    .skeleton-line {
      height: 16px;
      border-radius: 999px;
    }
    .skeleton-block {
      height: 118px;
      border-radius: 20px;
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="loading"] .results-skeleton {
      display: grid;
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="loading"] .results-shell,
    .results-panel[data-state="idle"] .results-skeleton {
      display: none;
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="idle"] .empty-state {
      display: grid;
    }
    .results-panel[data-state="success"] .empty-state,
    .results-panel[data-state="error"] .empty-state,
    .results-panel[data-state="loading"] .empty-state {
      display: none;
    }
    .empty-state {
      display: grid;
      gap: 12px;
      padding-top: 2px;
    }
    .empty-state h3 {
      font-size: 1.1rem;
    }
    .empty-state p {
      margin: 0;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      line-height: 1.6;
    }
    .empty-state ul {
      margin: 0;
      padding-left: 18px;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      line-height: 1.6;
    }
    .footer {
      margin-top: 24px;
      padding: 16px 4px 0;
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 14px;
      align-items: center;
      color: var(--text-soft);
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
    }
    .footer nav {
      display: flex;
      gap: 16px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .footer a {
      color: var(--text-muted);
    }
    .footer a:hover {
      color: var(--text);
    }
    .helper-row {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 10px;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }
    .helper-row .list-note {
      margin: 0;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
    }
    @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) {
      .button:hover,
      .button-secondary:hover,
      .button-link:hover {
        transform: translateY(-1px);
      }
      .button:hover {
        box-shadow: 0 18px 38px rgba(16, 81, 73, 0.34);
      }
      .button-secondary:hover,
      .button-link:hover {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      }
      .hero-copy:hover,
      .hero-signal:hover,
      .panel:hover,
      .results-panel:hover {
        border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24);
      }
      .signal-card:hover {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        transform: translateY(-1px);
        transition: transform 180ms var(--ease-out), background-color 180ms var(--ease-out), border-color 180ms var(--ease-out);
      }
    }
    @keyframes shimmer {
      100% {
        transform: translateX(100%);
      }
    }
    @media (max-width: 1100px) {
      .hero,
      .workspace {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }
      .results-panel {
        position: relative;
        top: 0;
      }
      h1 {
        max-width: 14ch;
      }
    }
    @media (max-width: 760px) {
      .page {
        padding: 18px 14px 28px;
      }
      .topbar {
        align-items: flex-start;
        flex-direction: column;
      }
      .topbar-meta {
        justify-content: flex-start;
      }
      .hero-copy,
      .hero-signal,
      .panel,
      .results-panel {
        border-radius: 22px;
        padding: 20px;
      }
      .field-grid,
      .results-grid,
      .signal-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }
      .salary-value strong {
        font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 14vw, 3.5rem);
      }
    }
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      html {
        scroll-behavior: auto;
      }
      *,
      *::before,
      *::after {
        animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
        animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
        transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
        scroll-behavior: auto !important;
      }
      .skeleton-line::after,
      .skeleton-block::after,
      .skeleton-pill::after {
        animation: none;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <a class="skip-link" href="#predictor">Skip to predictor</a>
  <div class="page">
    <header class="topbar">
      <a class="brand" href="#top" aria-label="Developer salary prediction home">
        <span class="brand-mark">DS</span>
        <span class="brand-copy">
          <strong>Developer salary prediction</strong>
          <span>FastAPI frontend with a refined data-entry flow</span>
        </span>
      </a>
      <div class="topbar-meta" aria-label="Project metadata">
        <span class="chip"><span class="dot" aria-hidden="true"></span><strong>Single-page</strong> vanilla HTML + CSS + JS</span>
        <span class="chip">Model route <strong>/api/v1/predict</strong></span>
        <a class="chip" href="/docs">Swagger docs</a>
      </div>
    </header>
    <main id="top">
      <section class="hero" aria-labelledby="hero-title">
        <div class="hero-copy">
          <p class="eyebrow">Salary intelligence for technical teams</p>
          <h1 id="hero-title">Predict annual compensation with clarity and restraint.</h1>
          <p>
            Enter the same survey-style fields your model was trained on, then get a clear salary estimate with
            validation, an input-confidence signal, and a results layout that keeps the data readable instead of noisy.
          </p>
          <div class="hero-actions">
            <a class="button" href="#predictor">
              <svg class="icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
                <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" />
              </svg>
              Start prediction
            </a>
            <a class="button-secondary" href="/api/v1/health">
              <svg class="icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
                <path d="M12 21s7-4.4 7-11V6l-7-3-7 3v4c0 6.6 7 11 7 11Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linejoin="round" />
                <path d="M9.5 12.2 11.5 14l3.2-4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
              </svg>
              Check API health
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>
        <aside class="hero-signal" aria-label="Project summary">
          <div class="signal-grid">
            <article class="signal-card">
              <span>Inputs</span>
              <strong>10 fields</strong>
              <code>schema matched</code>
            </article>
            <article class="signal-card">
              <span>Output</span>
              <strong>USD estimate</strong>
              <code>point estimate</code>
            </article>
            <article class="signal-card">
              <span>Model family</span>
              <strong>XGBoost regressor</strong>
              <code>log target</code>
            </article>
            <article class="signal-card">
              <span>Response</span>
              <strong>FastAPI JSON</strong>
              <code>/api/v1/predict</code>
            </article>
          </div>
          <div class="signal-board">
            <h2>What this interface does well</h2>
            <ul class="signal-list">
              <li>
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
                  <path d="M5 12.5 9 16l10-10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
                </svg>
                Shows the estimate in a dedicated results panel so the number has room to breathe.
              </li>
              <li>
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
                  <path d="M5 12.5 9 16l10-10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
                </svg>
                Surfaces inline validation before the request leaves the page.
              </li>
              <li>
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
                  <path d="M5 12.5 9 16l10-10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
                </svg>
                Uses a heuristic input-confidence meter so uncertainty is visible without pretending the backend returns intervals.
              </li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </aside>
      </section>
      <section class="workspace" id="predictor" aria-labelledby="predictor-title">
        <section class="panel">
          <div class="panel-header">
            <p class="eyebrow">Prediction form</p>
            <h2 id="predictor-title">Enter a developer profile</h2>
            <p class="panel-copy">
              The field values below align with the model schema. Free-text fields include suggestions to keep the inputs
              precise and consistent.
            </p>
            <p class="form-status" id="formStatus" role="status" aria-live="polite">
              Ready. Complete the fields and submit to generate a salary estimate.
            </p>
          </div>
          <form id="salaryForm" novalidate>
            <fieldset>
              <legend>Profile</legend>
              <div class="field-grid">
                <div class="field">
                  <label for="Age">Age range</label>
                  <select id="Age" name="Age" required>
                    <option value="18-24 years old">18-24 years old</option>
                    <option value="25-34 years old" selected>25-34 years old</option>
                    <option value="35-44 years old">35-44 years old</option>
                    <option value="45-54 years old">45-54 years old</option>
                    <option value="55-64 years old">55-64 years old</option>
                    <option value="65 years or older">65 years or older</option>
                    <option value="Prefer not to say">Prefer not to say</option>
                  </select>
                  <p class="field-message is-muted" data-error-for="Age" data-default="Use the same age band format as the survey dataset.">Use the same age band format as the survey dataset.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                  <label for="EdLevel">Education level</label>
                  <select id="EdLevel" name="EdLevel" required>
                    <option value="Primary/elementary school">Primary/elementary school</option>
                    <option value="Secondary school (e.g. American high school, German Realschule or Gymnasium, etc.)">Secondary school</option>
                    <option value="Some college/university study without earning a degree">Some college/university study without earning a degree</option>
                    <option value="Associate degree (A.A., A.S., etc.)">Associate degree</option>
                    <option value="Bachelor's degree (B.A., B.S., B.Eng., etc.)" selected>Bachelor's degree</option>
                    <option value="Master's degree (M.A., M.S., M.Eng., MBA, etc.)">Master's degree</option>
                    <option value="Professional degree (JD, MD, Ph.D, Ed.D, etc.)">Professional degree</option>
                    <option value="Other (please specify):">Other</option>
                  </select>
                  <p class="field-message is-muted" data-error-for="EdLevel" data-default="Choose the exact education label used by the model.">Choose the exact education label used by the model.</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </fieldset>
            <fieldset>
              <legend>Experience</legend>
              <div class="field-grid">
                <div class="field">
                  <label for="WorkExp">Work experience, years</label>
                  <input id="WorkExp" name="WorkExp" type="number" min="0" max="60" step="1" inputmode="numeric" value="5" required />
                  <p class="field-message is-muted" data-error-for="WorkExp" data-default="Enter a whole number between 0 and 60.">Enter a whole number between 0 and 60.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                  <label for="YearsCode">Years coding</label>
                  <input id="YearsCode" name="YearsCode" type="number" min="0" max="60" step="1" inputmode="numeric" value="8" required />
                  <p class="field-message is-muted" data-error-for="YearsCode" data-default="Enter a whole number between 0 and 60.">Enter a whole number between 0 and 60.</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </fieldset>
            <fieldset>
              <legend>Work context</legend>
              <div class="field-grid">
                <div class="field">
                  <label for="Employment">Employment status</label>
                  <select id="Employment" name="Employment" required>
                    <option value="Employed" selected>Employed</option>
                    <option value="Independent contractor, freelancer, or self-employed">Independent contractor, freelancer, or self-employed</option>
                    <option value="Student">Student</option>
                    <option value="Retired">Retired</option>
                    <option value="Not employed">Not employed</option>
                    <option value="I prefer not to say">I prefer not to say</option>
                  </select>
                  <p class="field-message is-muted" data-error-for="Employment" data-default="Choose the employment category used by the model.">Choose the employment category used by the model.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                  <label for="DevType">Developer type</label>
                  <select id="DevType" name="DevType" required>
                    <option value="Developer, back-end">Developer, back-end</option>
                    <option value="Developer, front-end">Developer, front-end</option>
                    <option value="Developer, full-stack" selected>Developer, full-stack</option>
                    <option value="Developer, mobile">Developer, mobile</option>
                    <option value="Data scientist or machine learning specialist">Data scientist or machine learning specialist</option>
                    <option value="DevOps specialist">DevOps specialist</option>
                  </select>
                  <p class="field-message is-muted" data-error-for="DevType" data-default="Match the survey role label as closely as possible.">Match the survey role label as closely as possible.</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </fieldset>
            <fieldset>
              <legend>Company and location</legend>
              <div class="field-grid">
                <div class="field">
                  <label for="OrgSize">Organization size</label>
                  <select id="OrgSize" name="OrgSize" required>
                    <option value="Less than 20 employees">Less than 20 employees</option>
                    <option value="20 to 99 employees">20 to 99 employees</option>
                    <option value="100 to 499 employees" selected>100 to 499 employees</option>
                    <option value="500 to 999 employees">500 to 999 employees</option>
                    <option value="1,000 to 4,999 employees">1,000 to 4,999 employees</option>
                    <option value="5,000 to 9,999 employees">5,000 to 9,999 employees</option>
                    <option value="10,000 or more employees">10,000 or more employees</option>
                    <option value="Just me - I am a freelancer, sole proprietor, etc.">Just me - I am a freelancer, sole proprietor, etc.</option>
                    <option value="I don't know">I don't know</option>
                  </select>
                  <p class="field-message is-muted" data-error-for="OrgSize" data-default="Choose the size bucket used in the dataset.">Choose the size bucket used in the dataset.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                  <label for="RemoteWork">Remote work</label>
                  <select id="RemoteWork" name="RemoteWork" required>
                    <option value="Remote" selected>Remote</option>
                    <option value="In-person">In-person</option>
                    <option value="Hybrid (some remote, leans heavy to in-person)">Hybrid (leans in-person)</option>
                    <option value="Hybrid (some in-person, leans heavy to flexibility)">Hybrid (leans flexibility)</option>
                    <option value="Your choice (very flexible, you can come in when you want or just as needed)">Your choice (very flexible)</option>
                  </select>
                  <p class="field-message is-muted" data-error-for="RemoteWork" data-default="Pick the remote-work label that matches the training schema.">Pick the remote-work label that matches the training schema.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                  <label for="Country">Country</label>
                  <input id="Country" name="Country" list="countryList" type="text" value="United States" placeholder="United States" autocomplete="country-name" required />
                  <datalist id="countryList">
                    <option value="United States"></option>
                    <option value="Canada"></option>
                    <option value="United Kingdom"></option>
                    <option value="Germany"></option>
                    <option value="India"></option>
                    <option value="Kenya"></option>
                    <option value="Brazil"></option>
                    <option value="Australia"></option>
                  </datalist>
                  <p class="field-message is-muted" data-error-for="Country" data-default="Use a specific country name, like United States or Germany.">Use a specific country name, like United States or Germany.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                  <label for="Industry">Industry</label>
                  <input id="Industry" name="Industry" list="industryList" type="text" value="Software Development" placeholder="Software Development" autocomplete="organization-title" required />
                  <datalist id="industryList">
                    <option value="Software Development"></option>
                    <option value="Fintech"></option>
                    <option value="Healthcare"></option>
                    <option value="Education"></option>
                    <option value="Retail"></option>
                    <option value="Cybersecurity"></option>
                    <option value="Public Sector"></option>
                    <option value="E-commerce"></option>
                  </datalist>
                  <p class="field-message is-muted" data-error-for="Industry" data-default="Use a specific sector name rather than a vague phrase.">Use a specific sector name rather than a vague phrase.</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </fieldset>
            <fieldset>
              <legend>Technical stack</legend>
              <div class="field-grid single">
                <div class="field full">
                  <label for="LanguageHaveWorkedWith">Languages worked with</label>
                  <input
                    id="LanguageHaveWorkedWith"
                    name="LanguageHaveWorkedWith"
                    type="text"
                    value="Python;SQL;JavaScript"
                    placeholder="Python;SQL;JavaScript"
                    autocomplete="off"
                    required
                  />
                  <p class="field-message is-muted" data-error-for="LanguageHaveWorkedWith" data-default="Separate languages with semicolons, like Python;SQL;JavaScript.">Separate languages with semicolons, like Python;SQL;JavaScript.</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </fieldset>
            <div class="actions">
              <button class="button" id="predictBtn" type="submit">
                <svg class="icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
                  <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" />
                </svg>
                Calculate estimate
              </button>
              <button class="button-secondary" type="button" id="resetBtn">
                Reset form
              </button>
            </div>
          </form>
        </section>
        <aside class="results-panel" id="resultPanel" data-state="idle" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true" aria-labelledby="results-title">
          <div class="results-skeleton" aria-hidden="true">
            <div class="skeleton-pill"></div>
            <div class="skeleton-line" style="width: 68%"></div>
            <div class="skeleton-block"></div>
            <div class="skeleton-block"></div>
            <div class="skeleton-line" style="width: 84%"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="results-shell">
            <div class="results-kicker">
              <div>
                <p class="eyebrow">Prediction result</p>
                <h2 id="results-title">Ready for an estimate</h2>
              </div>
              <span class="status-pill" id="resultState"><span class="pulse" aria-hidden="true"></span>Idle</span>
            </div>
            <section class="salary-display" aria-labelledby="salary-label">
              <div class="salary-label" id="salary-label">Annual salary estimate</div>
              <div class="salary-value">
                <span class="currency">US$</span>
                <strong id="salaryValue">—</strong>
                <span id="salaryMeta">Submit the form to calculate a point estimate.</span>
              </div>
            </section>
            <div class="results-grid">
              <article class="metric">
                <span>Input confidence</span>
                <strong id="confidenceValue">—</strong>
                <div class="meter" aria-hidden="true"><i id="confidenceBar"></i></div>
                <p id="confidenceNote">Heuristic based on schema fit and field completeness.</p>
              </article>
              <article class="metric">
                <span>Request latency</span>
                <strong id="latencyValue">—</strong>
                <p id="latencyNote">Measured from submit to response.</p>
              </article>
            </div>
            <p class="results-note" id="resultsNote">
              The backend returns a single point estimate. This interface surfaces that estimate clearly and labels the
              lack of a statistical interval so uncertainty stays visible.
            </p>
            <div class="empty-state" id="emptyState">
              <h3>Nothing has been calculated yet.</h3>
              <p>When you submit the form, this panel updates with the salary, an input-confidence heuristic, and the request timing.</p>
              <ul>
                <li>The result panel is sticky on wide screens, so the estimate stays visible while you work.</li>
                <li>All form validation appears inline, before the request is sent.</li>
                <li>Loading uses a skeleton that matches the final result layout instead of a generic spinner.</li>
              </ul>
            </div>
          </div>
        </aside>
      </section>
    </main>
    <footer class="footer">
      <p class="list-note">Built for developers and tech professionals who want precision, clarity, and a refined visual hierarchy.</p>
      <nav aria-label="Footer links">
        <a href="/docs">API docs</a>
        <a href="/api/v1/health">Health check</a>
        <a href="#top">Back to top</a>
      </nav>
    </footer>
  </div>
  <script>
    const form = document.getElementById("salaryForm");
    const resultPanel = document.getElementById("resultPanel");
    const predictBtn = document.getElementById("predictBtn");
    const resetBtn = document.getElementById("resetBtn");
    const formStatus = document.getElementById("formStatus");
    const resultState = document.getElementById("resultState");
    const resultsTitle = document.getElementById("results-title");
    const salaryValue = document.getElementById("salaryValue");
    const salaryMeta = document.getElementById("salaryMeta");
    const confidenceValue = document.getElementById("confidenceValue");
    const confidenceBar = document.getElementById("confidenceBar");
    const confidenceNote = document.getElementById("confidenceNote");
    const latencyValue = document.getElementById("latencyValue");
    const latencyNote = document.getElementById("latencyNote");
    const resultsNote = document.getElementById("resultsNote");
    const emptyState = document.getElementById("emptyState");
    const fields = [
      "Age",
      "EdLevel",
      "Employment",
      "WorkExp",
      "YearsCode",
      "DevType",
      "OrgSize",
      "RemoteWork",
      "Industry",
      "Country",
      "LanguageHaveWorkedWith",
    ];
    const labels = {
      Age: "age range",
      EdLevel: "education level",
      Employment: "employment status",
      WorkExp: "work experience",
      YearsCode: "years coding",
      DevType: "developer type",
      OrgSize: "organization size",
      RemoteWork: "remote work",
      Industry: "industry",
      Country: "country",
      LanguageHaveWorkedWith: "languages worked with",
    };
    const defaultMessages = new Map();
    document.querySelectorAll("[data-error-for]").forEach((node) => {
      defaultMessages.set(node.getAttribute("data-error-for"), node.dataset.default || node.textContent.trim());
    });
    function setPanelState(state) {
      resultPanel.dataset.state = state;
      if (state === "loading") {
        resultState.innerHTML = '<span class="pulse" aria-hidden="true"></span>Calculating';
        formStatus.textContent = "Calculating your estimate. The interface is waiting for the model response.";
        return;
      }
      if (state === "success") {
        resultState.innerHTML = '<span class="pulse" aria-hidden="true"></span>Complete';
        return;
      }
      if (state === "error") {
        resultState.innerHTML = '<span class="pulse" aria-hidden="true"></span>Needs attention';
        return;
      }
      resultState.innerHTML = '<span class="pulse" aria-hidden="true"></span>Idle';
    }
    function setFieldMessage(fieldId, message, isError = false) {
      const fieldMessage = document.querySelector(`[data-error-for="${fieldId}"]`);
      const input = document.getElementById(fieldId);
      if (!fieldMessage || !input) return;
      fieldMessage.textContent = message || defaultMessages.get(fieldId) || "";
      fieldMessage.classList.toggle("is-error", Boolean(isError));
      fieldMessage.classList.toggle("is-muted", !isError);
      input.setAttribute("aria-invalid", isError ? "true" : "false");
    }
    function clearFieldMessages() {
      fields.forEach((fieldId) => setFieldMessage(fieldId, defaultMessages.get(fieldId) || "", false));
      formStatus.classList.remove("is-error", "is-success");
    }
    function validateField(fieldId) {
      const input = document.getElementById(fieldId);
      if (!input) return "";
      const value = input.value.trim();
      let message = "";
      if (input.required && !value) {
        message = `Please enter ${labels[fieldId] || "this field"}.`;
      } else if ((fieldId === "WorkExp" || fieldId === "YearsCode") && value) {
        const numericValue = Number(value);
        if (!Number.isFinite(numericValue) || numericValue < 0 || numericValue > 60 || !Number.isInteger(numericValue)) {
          message = "Enter a whole number between 0 and 60.";
        }
      } else if ((fieldId === "Country" || fieldId === "Industry") && value.length < 2) {
        message = "Enter at least two characters.";
      } else if (fieldId === "LanguageHaveWorkedWith" && value && !value.includes(";")) {
        message = "Separate languages with semicolons, for example Python;SQL;JavaScript.";
      }
      setFieldMessage(fieldId, message || defaultMessages.get(fieldId) || "", Boolean(message));
      return message;
    }
    function validateForm() {
      const errors = [];
      fields.forEach((fieldId) => {
        const message = validateField(fieldId);
        if (message) errors.push({ fieldId, message });
      });
      return errors;
    }
    function getPayload() {
      return {
        Age: document.getElementById("Age").value,
        EdLevel: document.getElementById("EdLevel").value,
        Employment: document.getElementById("Employment").value,
        WorkExp: parseInt(document.getElementById("WorkExp").value, 10),
        YearsCode: parseInt(document.getElementById("YearsCode").value, 10),
        DevType: document.getElementById("DevType").value,
        OrgSize: document.getElementById("OrgSize").value,
        RemoteWork: document.getElementById("RemoteWork").value,
        Industry: document.getElementById("Industry").value.trim(),
        Country: document.getElementById("Country").value.trim(),
        LanguageHaveWorkedWith: document.getElementById("LanguageHaveWorkedWith").value.trim(),
      };
    }
    function computeInputConfidence(payload) {
      let score = 62;
      const exactFields = ["Age", "EdLevel", "Employment", "DevType", "OrgSize", "RemoteWork"];
      const exactMatches = exactFields.filter((fieldId) => Boolean(payload[fieldId])).length;
      score += exactMatches * 3;
      if (payload.WorkExp >= 1) score += 4;
      if (payload.YearsCode >= payload.WorkExp) score += 2;
      if (payload.Country.length >= 3) score += 4;
      if (payload.Industry.length >= 3) score += 4;
      if (payload.LanguageHaveWorkedWith.includes(";")) score += 5;
      if (payload.LanguageHaveWorkedWith.split(";").filter(Boolean).length >= 3) score += 2;
      return Math.max(48, Math.min(96, score));
    }
    function formatCurrency(value) {
      return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
        maximumFractionDigits: 0,
      }).format(value);
    }
    function setLoadingSkeleton() {
      resultPanel.dataset.state = "loading";
      setPanelState("loading");
      resultsTitle.textContent = "Calculating estimate";
      salaryValue.textContent = "—";
      salaryMeta.textContent = "The model is processing your profile.";
      confidenceValue.textContent = "—";
      confidenceBar.style.width = "22%";
      confidenceNote.textContent = "Waiting for the backend response.";
      latencyValue.textContent = "—";
      latencyNote.textContent = "Timing will appear after the response returns.";
      resultsNote.textContent = "Loading the estimate now. The skeleton matches the final layout so the panel never jumps.";
      emptyState.hidden = true;
    }
    function setIdleState() {
      resultPanel.dataset.state = "idle";
      setPanelState("idle");
      resultsTitle.textContent = "Ready for an estimate";
      salaryValue.textContent = "—";
      salaryMeta.textContent = "Submit the form to calculate a point estimate.";
      confidenceValue.textContent = "—";
      confidenceBar.style.width = "38%";
      confidenceNote.textContent = "Heuristic based on schema fit and field completeness.";
      latencyValue.textContent = "—";
      latencyNote.textContent = "Measured from submit to response.";
      resultsNote.textContent = "The backend returns a single point estimate. This interface surfaces that estimate clearly and labels the lack of a statistical interval so uncertainty stays visible.";
      emptyState.hidden = false;
    }
    function setErrorState(detail, latencyText = "") {
      resultPanel.dataset.state = "error";
      setPanelState("error");
      resultsTitle.textContent = "Prediction failed";
      salaryValue.textContent = "—";
      salaryMeta.textContent = detail || "The server returned an error.";
      confidenceValue.textContent = "N/A";
      confidenceBar.style.width = "12%";
      confidenceNote.textContent = "Validation or backend issue. Check the message below.";
      latencyValue.textContent = latencyText || "—";
      latencyNote.textContent = "The request reached the backend, but the response failed.";
      resultsNote.textContent = detail || "The server did not return a valid prediction.";
      emptyState.hidden = true;
    }
    function setSuccessState(predictedSalary, confidence, elapsedMs) {
      resultPanel.dataset.state = "success";
      setPanelState("success");
      resultsTitle.textContent = "Estimate generated";
      salaryValue.textContent = formatCurrency(predictedSalary).replace("$", "");
      salaryMeta.textContent = "Point estimate returned from the model.";
      confidenceValue.textContent = `${confidence}%`;
      confidenceBar.style.width = `${confidence}%`;
      confidenceNote.textContent = "Heuristic based on schema match and field completeness.";
      latencyValue.textContent = `${elapsedMs} ms`;
      latencyNote.textContent = "Measured from submit to response.";
      resultsNote.textContent = "The backend returns a single point estimate rather than a calibrated interval. The confidence meter reflects input quality, not statistical certainty.";
      emptyState.hidden = true;
    }
    function markFirstError(errors) {
      if (!errors.length) return;
      const first = document.getElementById(errors[0].fieldId);
      if (first) first.focus({ preventScroll: false });
      formStatus.textContent = `Please fix ${errors.length} field${errors.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} before calculating the estimate.`;
      formStatus.classList.add("is-error");
    }
    function syncValidationOnInput(event) {
      const target = event.target;
      if (!target || !target.id || !fields.includes(target.id)) return;
      validateField(target.id);
      const currentErrors = validateForm();
      if (currentErrors.length === 0) {
        formStatus.textContent = "All inputs look ready. Submit the form to generate an estimate.";
        formStatus.classList.remove("is-error");
        formStatus.classList.add("is-success");
      }
    }
    fields.forEach((fieldId) => {
      const input = document.getElementById(fieldId);
      if (!input) return;
      input.addEventListener("input", syncValidationOnInput);
      input.addEventListener("change", syncValidationOnInput);
      input.addEventListener("blur", () => validateField(fieldId));
    });
    resetBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      form.reset();
      clearFieldMessages();
      setIdleState();
      formStatus.textContent = "Ready. Complete the fields and submit to generate a salary estimate.";
      formStatus.classList.remove("is-error", "is-success");
    });
    form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
      event.preventDefault();
      clearFieldMessages();
      const errors = validateForm();
      if (errors.length) {
        markFirstError(errors);
        errors.forEach(({ fieldId, message }) => setFieldMessage(fieldId, message, true));
        setErrorState(`Please correct ${errors.length} field${errors.length > 1 ? "s" : ""} and try again.`);
        return;
      }
      const payload = getPayload();
      const startedAt = performance.now();
      predictBtn.disabled = true;
      predictBtn.innerHTML = `
        <svg class="icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" />
        </svg>
        Calculating...
      `;
      setLoadingSkeleton();
      try {
        const response = await fetch("/api/v1/predict", {
          method: "POST",
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          body: JSON.stringify(payload),
        });
        const data = await response.json();
        if (!response.ok) {
          const detail = typeof data?.detail === "string" ? data.detail : "The prediction request failed.";
          const elapsed = Math.max(1, Math.round(performance.now() - startedAt));
          setErrorState(detail, `${elapsed} ms`);
          formStatus.textContent = detail;
          formStatus.classList.add("is-error");
          return;
        }
        const salary = Number(data.predicted_salary ?? data.prediction ?? NaN);
        if (!Number.isFinite(salary)) {
          const elapsed = Math.max(1, Math.round(performance.now() - startedAt));
          setErrorState("The backend returned an invalid salary value.", `${elapsed} ms`);
          formStatus.textContent = "The backend returned an invalid salary value.";
          formStatus.classList.add("is-error");
          return;
        }
        const elapsed = Math.max(1, Math.round(performance.now() - startedAt));
        const confidence = computeInputConfidence(payload);
        setSuccessState(salary, confidence, elapsed);
        formStatus.textContent = "Estimate generated successfully.";
        formStatus.classList.remove("is-error");
        formStatus.classList.add("is-success");
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(error);
        const elapsed = Math.max(1, Math.round(performance.now() - startedAt));
        setErrorState("Connection failed. Please confirm that the FastAPI app is running and the model file exists.", `${elapsed} ms`);
        formStatus.textContent = "Connection failed. Please confirm that the FastAPI app is running and the model file exists.";
        formStatus.classList.add("is-error");
      } finally {
        predictBtn.disabled = false;
        predictBtn.innerHTML = `
          <svg class="icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
            <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" />
          </svg>
          Calculate estimate
        `;
      }
    });
    clearFieldMessages();
    setIdleState();
  </script>
</body>
</html>
